charter: Implement the docs and website platform using Docusaurus with the built-in Docusaurus blog. Migrate the current website/docs/blog surface into the Docusaurus structure, keep product truth aligned with the accepted planning/launch artifacts, and preserve product-marketing ownership of website/docs/blog content.
acceptance_contract: Docusaurus app scaffold exists and runs locally
docs and blog are wired into the repo structure
current launch/docs messaging is represented inside the new site
website ownership remains with product_marketing artifacts and workflow
